subcodes.first_line: Say: verily Bahá doth not await the beginning of whatsoever tribulation hath been ordained for Him, nor doth He seek deliverance, and He saith: "O my God!" [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل ان البهاء لاینتظر البدآء فیما قضی له من البلا و لایطلب الفرج و یقول یا الهی
subcodes.subjects: @acquiescence and resignation; contentment, @suffering and imprisonment, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @love of God, @justice and wrath of God
